templates.name: Recruitment Message
templates.content:
🔥 **WE'RE RECRUITING!** 🔥

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Contact:** {sender_name}

Join us and dominate {server_name}!

💪 Active players welcome!
🎯 Team-oriented gameplay
🏆 Competitive and fun environment

templates.name: Alliance Meeting
[S02] Temperature Alert
templates.content:
❄️ **[S02] TEMPERATURE ALERT** ❄️

**Current Temp:** {notes}
**Action Required:** Keep furnaces fueled with coal!

⚠️ Frozen bases lose functionality
🔥 Use High-Heat Furnaces to stay warm
🏭 Check Alliance Furnace coverage

**Reminder:** Base temperature ranges from -15°C to -80°C. Don't let your base freeze!

templates.name: [S02] Rare Soil Coordination
[S02] Polar Beast Rally
[S02] Supply Collection Alert
[S02] Resource Donation Request
templates.content:
⛏️ **[S02] RESOURCE DONATION NEEDED** ⛏️

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Requested by:** {sender_name}

**Resources Needed:**
{notes}

🪨 **Coal** - Fuels furnaces and constructs buildings
🔩 **Titanium Alloy** - Upgrades furnaces and military structures

**How to get:**
✅ Complete Season 2 quests
✅ Win battles against polar enemies
✅ Collect from Supply Collections
✅ Alliance donations

Every contribution helps our alliance ranking!

templates.name: [S02] Weekly Mission Reminder
templates.content:
📋 **[S02] WEEKLY MISSIONS** 📋

**Week:** {notes}
**Server:** {server_name}
**Reset:** {event_time}

🎯 **Alliance Goals:**
• Mutual Assistance contributions
• Siege operations participation
• Rare Soil War activity
• Combat victories tracking

🎁 **Rewards Available:**
• Coal & Titanium Alloy
• Weekly Pass rewards
• Season Battle Pass progress
• Hero weapon passes (Murphy, Carlie, Swift)

Let's complete these together!

templates.name: [S02] Siege Operation
[S02] Emperor Boreas Battle
templates.content:
👑 **[S02] EMPEROR BOREAS BATTLE** 👑

**Rally Leader:** {sender_name}
**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Rally Time:** {event_time}

❄️ **Mission:** Defeat Emperor Boreas!
🎯 **Objective:** Primary season goal
🏆 **Rewards:** Major alliance ranking boost

**Preparation Required:**
• Max furnace heat for virus resistance
• Upgraded military structures
• Full hero lineup
• Coordinate with alliance members

{notes}

@everyone This is the BIG ONE! Let's take down Boreas!

templates.name: [VS-D1] Radar Training
templates.content:
📡 **[VS-D1] RADAR TRAINING** 📡

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 1 Start:** {event_time}
**Coordinator:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **Complete Radar Tasks** → 10,000 pts each
🔹 **Use Drone Parts** → 2,500 pts each
🔹 **Drone Skill Chips** → 1,000 pts per point gained
🔹 **Use Stamina** → 150 pts each

💡 **Strategy Tips:**
• Save radar tasks for Day 1
• Stock up drone parts beforehand
• Use stamina efficiently
• Buy diamond packs (30 pts per diamond)
• Gather resources (20 pts per 100)

{notes}

@everyone Let's crush Day 1!

templates.name: [VS-D2] Base Expansion
templates.content:
🏗️ **[VS-D2] BASE EXPANSION** 🏗️

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 2 Start:** {event_time}
**Coordinator:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **UR Trade Truck** → 100,000 pts each
🔹 **Legendary Secret Task** → 75,000 pts each
🔹 **Recruit Survivor** → 1,500 pts each
🔹 **Construction Speedups** → 50 pts per min
🔹 **Building Power** → 10 pts per point

💡 **Strategy Tips:**
• Save UR trade trucks for Day 2
• Complete legendary secret tasks
• Use construction speedups strategically
• Recruit survivors when available
• Diamond packs still count (30 pts)

{notes}

@everyone Build strong!

templates.name: [VS-D3] Age of Science
templates.content:
🔬 **[VS-D3] AGE OF SCIENCE** 🔬

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 3 Start:** {event_time}
**Coordinator:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **Level 7 Drone Chest** → 810,000 pts
🔹 **Level 6 Drone Chest** → 270,000 pts
🔹 **Level 5 Drone Chest** → 90,000 pts
🔹 **Complete Radar Tasks** → 10,000 pts
🔹 **Research Speedups** → 50 pts per min

💡 **Strategy Tips:**
• SAVE drone chests for Day 3!
• Use valor badges (300 pts)
• Complete radar tasks
• Use research speedups strategically
• Tech power gains = 10 pts each

{notes}

@everyone Science rules!

templates.name: [VS-D4] Train Heroes
templates.content:
🦸 **[VS-D4] TRAIN HEROES** 🦸

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 4 Start:** {event_time}
**Coordinator:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **Legendary Hero Shard** → 10,000 pts
🔹 **Exclusive Weapon Shard** → 10,000 pts
🔹 **Epic Hero Shard** → 3,500 pts
🔹 **Elite Recruit** → 1,500 pts
🔹 **Rare Hero Shard** → 1,000 pts

💡 **Strategy Tips:**
• Save hero shards for Day 4
• Elite recruit when possible
• Use hero EXP (1 pt per 660 EXP)
• Skill medals = 10 pts each
• Diamond packs count (30 pts)

{notes}

@everyone Power up heroes!

templates.name: [VS-D5] Total Mobilization
templates.content:
⚡ **[VS-D5] TOTAL MOBILIZATION** ⚡

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 5 Start:** {event_time}
**Coordinator:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **Complete Radar Tasks** → 10,000 pts
🔹 **Train High-Level Units** → 110 pts (T10)
🔹 **All Speedups Count** → 50 pts per min
🔹 **Building Power** → 10 pts per point
🔹 **Tech Power** → 10 pts per point

💡 **Strategy Tips:**
• Train highest tier troops possible
• Use all types of speedups
• Complete radar tasks
• Increase building/tech power
• Balance all activities for max points

{notes}

@everyone All hands on deck!

templates.name: [VS-D6] Enemy Buster
templates.content:
⚔️ **[VS-D6] ENEMY BUSTER** ⚔️

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Day 6 Start:** {event_time}
**War Commander:** {sender_name}

🎯 **HIGH-VALUE OBJECTIVES:**
🔹 **UR Trade Truck** → 100,000 pts
🔹 **Legendary Secret Task** → 75,000 pts
🔹 **KILL RIVAL TROOPS** → 10-55 pts per unit
🔹 **All Speedups** → 50 pts per min
🔹 **Units Lost** → 2-11 pts (careful!)

💡 **BATTLE STRATEGY:**
• **PRIORITY:** Kill rival alliance troops
• Higher tier kills = more points
• All speedups count equally
• Even your losses count for points
• Coordinate attacks with alliance

⚠️ **Fight smart, not reckless!**

{notes}

@everyone Final push - let's win this!
